phrases.intent_en: Ask where the pilgrim mass entrance is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde es la entrada para la misa del peregrino?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DON-de es la en-TRA-da pa-ra la MEE-sa del pe-re-GREE-no?

likely_response.local: Por la Puerta Santa, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah SAHN-tah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Through the Holy Door, follow the signs.

responses.english: Through the Holy Door, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah SAHN-tah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Por la Puerta Santa, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where rooftop tour tickets are sold
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde compro las entradas para visitar las cubiertas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh KOHM-proh lahs en-TRAH-dahs PAH-rah bee-see-TAHR lahs koo-BEE-air-tahs

likely_response.local: En la taquilla de tours, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah DEH TOH-oors AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the tour ticket counter, on the right.

responses.english: At the tour ticket counter, on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah DEH TOH-oors AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: En la taquilla de tours, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get the Compostela certificate
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo recoger el certificado de la Compostela?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh PWEH-doh reh-koh-HEHR el sehr-tee-fee-KAH-doh deh lah kohm-poh-STEH-lah?

likely_response.local: En la Oficina del Peregrino, a cinco minutos.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH oh-fee-THEE-nah DEHL peh-rehh-REE-noh AH THEEN-koh mee-NOO-tohs
likely_response.translation_en: At the Pilgrim Office, five minutes away.

responses.english: At the Pilgrim Office, five minutes away.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH oh-fee-THEE-nah DEHL peh-rehh-REE-noh AH THEEN-koh mee-NOO-tohs
responses.local: En la Oficina del Peregrino, a cinco minutos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tomb of St James is located
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde se encuentra la tumba del Apóstol Santiago?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh seh ehn-koo-EHN-trah lah TOOM-bah dehl ah-POHS-tohl sahn-tee-AH-goh?

likely_response.local: Debajo del altar mayor, bajando las escaleras.
likely_response.pronunciation: deh-BAH-hoh DEHL ahl-TAHR mah-YOHR bah-HAHN-doh LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs
likely_response.translation_en: Under the main altar, going down the stairs.

responses.english: Under the main altar, going down the stairs.
responses.phonetic: deh-BAH-hoh DEHL ahl-TAHR mah-YOHR bah-HAHN-doh LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs
responses.local: Debajo del altar mayor, bajando las escaleras.
